questions.question: Describe the difference between a left child node and a right child node in a binary tree. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the structure of the tree and the relationships between nodes.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of searching for an element in an empty binary tree? Provide a reason to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the definition of an empty tree and the operations involved in searching.

questions.question: Write a step-by-step algorithm to determine whether a given binary tree is balanced. Explain your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the definition of a balanced tree and the required checks to verify it.
